movie.synopsis: Bharat Bhhagya Vidhaata (2026) Bharat Bhhagya Viddhata (2026) Bharat Bhagya Vidhata (2026) Inside Cama Hospital, one of the sites targeted during the 2008 Mumbai terror attacks, nurses, ward boys, cleaners, lift operators, security personnel, and administrative workers keep 400 people alive while armed assailants struck the city around them.
